title: paxistima myrsinites
intro: Paxistima myrsinites, also known as Mountain Gold or Golden Ragwort, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties. Paxistima myrsinites can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk remedies and alternative medicine.
